title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Zomato Holdings Services - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Zomato Holdings Services - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
We at Zomato Holdings Services are looking for an experienced Backend Developer based out of Varanasi. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Zomato Holdings Services:
Zomato Holdings Services is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Integrate third-party APIs and services

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in React

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Learning & development budget
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Varanasi, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Zomato Holdings Services!
